short_description: ONT direct-RNA modification local workflow (Dorado + modkit).
description: A lightweight local workflow for ONT direct-RNA base modification detection. Requires RNA004 kit data. Runs Dorado basecalling then modkit pileup or extract. Supports m6A, m6A_DRACH, inosine, inosine_m6A_2OmeA, pseU, pseU_2OmeU, m5C, m5C_2OmeC, and 2OmeG modification types.
input: POD5 or modBAM (+ optional reference FASTA)
